tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating prediabetes or early diabetes, while fasting glucose is at the upper normal limit. Renal function, electrolytes, and calcium are within normal ranges. Slightly decreased total CO₂ may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Recommend clinical correlation for glycemic control and possible further evaluation of acid-base status.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
